topics.title: Hostility Toward Rachel Hunter
topics.summary: The show features a heated discussion regarding the host's use of profanity toward guest Rachel Hunter and includes several disparaging pre-recorded segments about her.

topics.title: Host Confronts Listener Complaints and Guest Behavior
topics.summary: The show features a segment where the host addresses listener complaints regarding his use of profanity on satellite radio while also discussing personal anecdotes with comedian Bob Levy.

topics.title: Comedy Club Dynamics and Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio explores the professional hierarchies, personal behaviors, and bizarre experiences of stand-up comedians touring with Bob Levy.

topics.title: Tabitha and Bob Levy Interactions
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Tabitha's past sexual encounters with Bob Levy and Jeff the Drunk, followed by a segment on news reports and intern feedback.

topics.title: Interview with Sean King
topics.summary: The studio hosts an interview with Sean King, the wife of Larry King, discussing her personal life, her Mormon faith, and her marriage.

topics.title: Marriage and Relationship with Larry King
topics.summary: The studio explores the personal history, marital dynamics, and intimate details of a woman's relationship with Larry King.

topics.title: Sean King Musical Performance and Personal History
topics.summary: The studio features Sean King performing her new single "Find Me" while discussing her marriage, past relationships, and the production of her music.

topics.title: Sean King Album and Plastic Surgery Reports
topics.summary: The studio discusses Sean King's new album, the media coverage regarding Howard Stern's plastic surgery, and a report on producer K.C. Armstrong's time in rehab.

topics.title: Childhood Trauma and Locker Room Culture
topics.summary: The studio explores the experiences of an athlete discussing locker room dynamics, his personal history with childhood sexual abuse by a mail carrier, and the complexities of navigating those memories in public.

topics.title: Former NFL Player's Life and Struggles
topics.summary: The show features an interview with a former professional football player who discusses his transition from the NFL to life as a sex worker, his struggles with drug addiction, and his experiences in the sports world.

topics.title: Roy Simmons Interview and Media Censorship Debate
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with former NFL player Roy Simmons regarding his memoir and personal experiences, followed by a discussion on the implications of congressional hearings concerning media decency and satellite radio censorship.

topics.title: Radio Show Segment and Celebrity Discussion
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming segments including an interview with Joey Boots, the results of a celebrity guessing game, and a conversation regarding Sean King's interview.

topics.title: Satellite Radio and Celebrity Riders
topics.summary: The studio explores the creative freedom of satellite radio compared to terrestrial constraints, discusses the specific backstage requirements for the Rolling Stones, and examines public health ratings for New York City restaurants.

topics.title: Plastic Surgery and Personal Life Reflections
topics.summary: The studio features a candid discussion regarding the motivations behind plastic surgery, the impact of marriage on professional focus, and personal anecdotes about past lifestyles.

topics.title: News and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including personal anecdotes about past relationships, political commentary on New Orleans and Hillary Clinton, reports on local crimes and sports news, and a segment on the concept of religion.
